reasoning: The control AU-10(5) focuses on non-repudiation through digital signatures, which can be mapped to ensuring the integrity and non-repudiation of audit logs in Kubernetes. This involves enabling audit logging, configuring retention policies to ensure logs are available for review, and ensuring that logs are protected against tampering, which can be achieved through TLS and integrity checks.
